subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends! They say that the soaring eagle in this resplendent firmament consisteth of three luminous stars [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی گویند که نسر طائر در این فلک باهر عبارت از سه ستاره روشن است
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @unity; oneness of humanity
